/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing -fwrapv -fvisibility=hidden -Wno-format-truncation -Wno-format-overflow -mfpmath=sse -g -shared  -o release/ref_gl1.so CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/qgl.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_draw.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_image.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_light.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_lightmap.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_main.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_mesh.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_model.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_scrap.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_surf.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_warp.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/gl1/gl1_sdl.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/files/models.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/files/pcx.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/files/stb.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/files/surf.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/files/wal.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/client/refresh/files/pvs.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/common/shared/shared.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/common/md4.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gl1.dir/src/backends/unix/shared/hunk.c.o  -lm -ldl -rdynamic -Wl,--no-undefined -lGL -Wl,-Bstatic -lSDL2main -Wl,-Bdynamic -lSDL2
